environment_type: Primary setting; massive urban hub and ceremonial assembly ground.
visual_summary: A sprawling, high-density Martian metropolis centered around a grand urban plaza. The space is defined by towering metal residential structures and is bordered by palaces and mechanical cafes. The architecture is characterized by high-rise metal construction and a sense of immense scale.
layout_notes: Central gathering space surrounded by palaces, mechanical cafes, and high-rise metal residences.
mood: Bustling, vibrant, and grand social hub atmosphere.
constraints: Must maintain a sense of massive scale and high density.
Functions as a ceremonial assembly ground for military purposes.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific layout of the mechanical cafes relative to the palaces is not detailed.
Exact architectural style of the "palaces" (beyond being surrounding structures) is unspecified.
evidence_summary: Environment currently kept under extracted canonical id.
